problem.title: Find the Length of the Longest Common Prefix

approaches.title: Trie-based prefix matching
approaches.summary: Builds a digit trie from the shorter input array and queries each number in the other array to find the maximum shared prefix length. Revision 2 keeps the same

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial digit-trie implementation for inserting numbers and counting matching prefixes.

revisions.commitBody:
- removed the need for .reverse() and ilog10 in get_arr()
- used derive default for the constructors
- remove the need for change of ownership to find the smallest vec
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactors the trie implementation idiomatically, avoids reversing digits and calculating logarithms, and avoids rearr.”
